title: Imposition of tax
doc_html:
PART III.  SWEET POTATO TAX

§2701.  Imposition of tax

There shall be a tax levied on all sweet potatoes shipped in the state to be imposed and collected as provided in Title 3.
doc_text:
PART III.  SWEET POTATO TAX
§2701.  Imposition of tax
There shall be a tax levied on all sweet potatoes shipped in the state to be imposed and collected as provided in Title 3.
